name: conductor
description: An installable AI workflow plugin that routes complex software tasks through focused specialist skills for architecture, UI/UX, documentation, diagrams, databases, QA, security, and gated resilience review.

interface.shortDescription: Route complex coding work through focused specialist skills
interface.longDescription: Use Orchestra to route software tasks through governance, orchestration, and specialist skills for architecture, QA, security, UI/UX, documentation, diagrams, and implementation.
defaultPrompt: Use Orchestra to route this software task through the right specialist skills.
